concerns.detail: Deletion removes a substantive claim about an advisor taking a student to academic court over collaboration with a Chinese institution, which appears to suppress a specific legitimate observation about advising practices rather than cleanup.
concerns.excerpt: 听说曾经把学生告上学术法庭，因为学生和中国机构合作发paper

concerns.detail: Inserted text contains profane personal insult '他妈的纯出生' (pure bastard/animal) directed at a PhD student, constituting a pure personal attack without substantive criticism of advising practices.
